response.overview: Following the events of Johnny Sins 6: The Sinner's Redemption, special agent Johnny Sins is BACK!  The dastardly villains of the world have acquired and are planning to release THE FILES; a flash drive containing sensitive information about government officials and other agents.  Can Johnny maintain the American people's trust in their leaders by stopping the files from being released? Or will the status quo be destroyed forever?
response.title: Johnny Sins 7: Deadly Sins
